steps.title: Find the causal connection
steps.content: The observation raised questions, and then the team conducted an investigation to address those questions. The blank should express what initiated the study.

steps.title: Select the causal relationship
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "initiated or triggered by" — the prior observation caused Cordero's team to conduct the study. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — released in: published or issued — the study wasn't published inside an observation; it was launched because of one. ✗
  • Choice B — acknowledged in: recognized within — this would mean the study merely mentioned the observation, not that the observation triggered the study. ✗
  • Choice C — excluded by: left out or blocked — this contradicts the logic; the observation started the study, not prevented it. ✗
  • Choice D — prompted by: triggered or initiated by — the thermal-image observation raised questions, directly motivating the investigation. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
